scripts.format: oxfmt && prettier --write --ignore-unknown --log-level=warn --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern "**/*.{md,mdx,markdown,json,jsonc,json5,yaml,yml,html,htm,css,scss,less,vue,graphql,gql,hbs,handlebars}" && uv run --locked ruff format . && autocorrect --fix .
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:js && pnpm run lint:py && pnpm run lint:text
scripts.lint:js: oxlint && pnpm -r run --if-present lint && oxfmt --check && prettier --check --ignore-unknown --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern "**/*.{md,mdx,markdown,json,jsonc,json5,yaml,yml,html,htm,css,scss,less,vue,graphql,gql,hbs,handlebars}"
scripts.lint:py: uv run --locked ruff check . && uv run --locked ruff format --check .
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --fix && pnpm -r run --if-present lint:fix && uv run --locked ruff check --fix . && pnpm run format
